title: Japanese Verb Conjugation Tower
description: Toggle morpheme layers (causative, passive/potential, polite, negative, past) and watch a Japanese verb assemble morpheme-by-morpheme in canonical composition order, with each tier highlighting the newly-added morpheme and naming its auxiliary (助動詞). Search 26,784 verbs by romaji, kana, or kanji — romaji is auto-converted to kana.
